name: The Green Wizard Gnome
short_description: Time to defeat those knights! Now you too can become the legendary Green Wizard Gnome. Your task is to collect gold, fight knights, and create chaos among the guards.
detailed_description:
Time to defeat those knights! Now you too can become the legendary Green Wizard Gnome. Your task is to collect gold, fight knights, and create chaos among the guards.

Wander through the store, collect shiny coins, and show everyone that a true wizard gnome can always find a way out of any situation. But most importantly, beware of the cashier!

Remember, this crawly green wizard gnome can perish at the hands of knights, so don't forget to heal with potions scattered around the mall. Collect as much gold as possible while avoiding or defeating the guards and knights who will try to stop you!
about_the_game:

Remember, this crawly green wizard gnome can perish at the hands of knights, so don't forget to heal with potions scattered around the mall. Collect as much gold as possible while avoiding or defeating the guards and knights who will try to stop you!
